ValidationRule.description: Created for Agentforce Hackathon 2026 Retail & Consumer Goods Use Case (Kilimanjaro Force Team)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Data_Source__c, "WhatsApp Field Query"), OR(ISBLANK(Address__Latitude__s), ISBLANK( Address__Longitude__s )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: GPS coordinates are required for WhatsApp field queries.
